interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get aggregated content for the home page including today’s schedule preview, featured artists and dishes, a featured donation fund, and planner shortcuts.

interfaces.name: getTicketPurchaseOptions
interfaces.description: Get available ticket types and their tiers for the Tickets page, including pricing and validity information.

cheapest_available_price.description: Minimum price among available tiers for this ticket type

interfaces.name: simulateTicketSelection
interfaces.description: Calculate subtotal and budget fit for a proposed set of ticket selections before adding them to the cart.

parameters.name: budget
parameters.description: Optional budget cap, e.g., 260 for $260. Used to determine if selection stays under budget.

amount_over_budget.description: 0 if within budget; positive amount if over budget

interfaces.name: addTicketsToCart
interfaces.description: Add one or more ticket selections to the internal cart, creating the cart if needed.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents, totals, and ticket details for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific cart item and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: startOrGetCheckoutSession
interfaces.description: Initialize or retrieve the current checkout session for the active cart, including available delivery methods and order summary.

interfaces.name: updateCheckoutDeliveryAndDetails
interfaces.description: Update checkout delivery method and basic purchaser details (name, email, phone).

current_step.description: Likely remains 'delivery' or moves to 'payment' based on UI flow.

interfaces.name: proceedToPaymentStep
interfaces.description: Advance the checkout session to the payment step without processing any real payment.

current_step.description: Will be 'payment' after a successful call.

interfaces.name: getScheduleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Schedule page including days, time ranges, and stages.

interfaces.name: getSchedule
interfaces.description: Get a list of performances for a given day with optional filters by time range and stage.

startTimeFrom.description: Optional filter for earliest start time, e.g., '14:00'

startTimeTo.description: Optional filter for latest start time, e.g., '22:00'

isMusicOnly.description: If true, only include performances where is_music_performance is true.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific performance/event including artist, stage, and schedule information.

interfaces.name: addPerformanceToMySchedule
interfaces.description: Add a performance to the single-user My Schedule list.

interfaces.name: removePerformanceFromMySchedule
interfaces.description: Remove a performance from the single-user My Schedule list.

interfaces.name: getMyScheduleOverview
interfaces.description: Get all performances saved in My Schedule, for use in My Planner or dedicated My Schedule views.

interfaces.name: getLineupFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Lineup page including days, stages, and artist types.

interfaces.name: getLineup
interfaces.description: Get artists in the lineup with day, time, stage, and artist type filters.

timeStartFrom.description: Optional earliest performance start time, e.g., '18:00'

timeStartTo.description: Optional latest performance start time, e.g., '23:59'

interfaces.name: getArtistDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an artist including bio and all scheduled performances.

interfaces.name: addArtistToFavorites
interfaces.description: Save an artist into the single-user favorites/My Lineup list.

interfaces.name: removeArtistFromFavorites
interfaces.description: Remove an artist from the single-user favorites/My Lineup list.

interfaces.name: getMyLineupOverview
interfaces.description: Get the user’s saved artists and any custom artist lists for the My Lineup section.

interfaces.name: upsertArtistList
interfaces.description: Create a new artist list or rename/update an existing one (e.g., 'Saturday Night').

parameters.name: artistListId
parameters.description: If provided, update the existing list; if omitted, create a new list.

interfaces.name: assignArtistsToList
interfaces.description: Assign one or more artists to a specific artist list for custom lineups.

parameters.name: append
parameters.description: If true (default), add to existing entries; if false, replace list members with the provided artists.

interfaces.name: getFoodFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Food & Vendors page including dish types, cuisines, dietary tags, price, and ratings.

interfaces.name: searchDishes
interfaces.description: Search and filter dishes for the Food & Vendors page by type, price, rating, cuisine, and dietary tags.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional free-text search across dish and vendor names.

isVegetarian.description: If true, only show dishes marked vegetarian.

interfaces.name: getDishDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific dish including vendor and map-related info.

interfaces.name: addDishToTastingList
interfaces.description: Add a dish to the single-user Tasting List/Favorites.

interfaces.name: removeDishFromTastingList
interfaces.description: Remove a dish from the single-user Tasting List/Favorites.

interfaces.name: getTastingList
interfaces.description: Get all dishes saved in the Tasting List for the My Planner Tasting List view.

interfaces.name: getActivityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Activities & Workshops page including types, days, levels, price, and rating.

interfaces.name: searchActivities
interfaces.description: Search and filter activities/workshops by type, day, time, price, level, rating, and family/kids focus.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional free-text search across activity names and descriptions.

isFree.description: If true, only show free activities.

kidsOnly.description: If true, only show kids-focused activities.

familyFriendlyOnly.description: If true, only show family-friendly activities.

interfaces.name: getActivityDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for an activity or workshop including instructor, location, schedule, and rating.

interfaces.name: registerForWorkshop
interfaces.description: Submit an on-site registration for a specific workshop activity.

interfaces.name: addActivityToFamilyPlan
interfaces.description: Add an activity to the single-user Family Plan list.

interfaces.name: removeActivityFromFamilyPlan
interfaces.description: Remove an activity from the single-user Family Plan list.

interfaces.name: getFamilyPlan
interfaces.description: Get all activities saved in the Family Plan for the My Planner Family Plan view.

interfaces.name: getMapOverview
interfaces.description: Get initial festival map context including the Main Stage location, map bounds, and available filters.

interfaces.name: searchMapLocations
interfaces.description: Search map locations by name and type (e.g., find the Main Stage).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to search in location names, e.g., 'main stage'

walking_time_from_main_stage.description: Approximate walking time in minutes from Main Stage if known.

interfaces.name: getFoodVendorsNearLocation
interfaces.description: Get food vendors near a given map location, filtered by vendor food type and maximum walking time.

parameters.name: maxWalkingTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Maximum walking time in minutes from the reference location, e.g., 3.

interfaces.name: pinMapLocation
interfaces.description: Pin a map location (e.g., food stall) to the user’s Saved Locations / My Route.

parameters.name: routeOrder
parameters.description: Optional initial order index for routing.

interfaces.name: getSavedMapLocations
interfaces.description: Get all pinned map locations for the user, including any route ordering.

related_vendor_food_type.description: If this is a food vendor, its vendor_food_type, e.g., 'main', 'dessert', 'drink'

interfaces.name: reorderSavedMapLocations
interfaces.description: Update the order of saved map locations (for routes such as mains → dessert → drinks).

interfaces.name: getDonationPageOptions
interfaces.description: Get available donation funds, suggested amounts, and supported payment methods for the Donate page.

default_amount.description: Default pre-selected donation amount, may be one of the suggested amounts.

interfaces.name: submitDonation
interfaces.description: Submit a donation to a specific fund with amount, payment method (e.g., credit card), and newsletter opt-in. No real payment is processed.

interfaces.name: getMyPlannerOverview
interfaces.description: Get a consolidated overview of the user’s planner: schedule, tasting list, lineup, family plan, and saved map locations.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get static and semi-static informational content for the About page: mission, cultural focus, history, logistics, and policies.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get contact methods and guidance for the Contact page: emails, phone numbers, on-site help, and common issues.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry via the Contact form.

case_reference.description: Reference ID for the submitted inquiry.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current Cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute cart subtotal and total after cart item changes.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCheckoutSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize a CheckoutSession associated with the current Cart.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateMyScheduleStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of MyScheduleItem records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateTastingListStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of TastingListItem records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateFamilyPlanStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of FamilyPlanItem records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateArtistFavoritesStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of ArtistFavorite records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateArtistListsStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of ArtistList and ArtistListItem records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedMapLocationsStore
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage persistence of SavedMapLocation records for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNewsletterSubscription
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or update NewsletterSubscription records when a user opts in via donations or other flows.
